title: Web Development
description:
Full-stack developer with strong software engineering skills.

Frontend: HTML5, CSS, Tailwind CSS, React, Framer Motion, Redux, React TanStack Query.
Backend: Node.js (Express), Python (FastAPI).
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB.
Docker containerization.
Intermediate knowledge: PHP, Java, C++, Bash.

title: Mobile Development
description:
Intermediate experience in mobile app development.
Primarily React Native and low-code platforms like Bubble.
Currently learning native technologies: Kotlin (Android), Swift (iOS).

title: Cloud Knowledge
description:
Experience with cloud platforms: Cloudflare, AWS, Vercel.
Worked with S3 buckets, EC2, ECS, and edge functions.

title: Cybersecurity Knowledge
description:
Intermediate knowledge in cybersecurity:
Networking protocols and vulnerabilities, authentication, authorization, encryption (hashing), database and client-side security.
Practiced attacks for learning: XSS, clickjacking, cookie theft, MITM, phishing simulations.

title: Soft Skills
description:
Strong communication and presentation skills developed through philosophy and oratory.
Experienced presenting to large audiences of hundreds.
High stress tolerance and ability to meet tight deadlines, gained from working as a professional chef.

title: Languages
description:
Passionate about connecting with people.
Native Spanish, bilingual English, proficient French, basic Portuguese.
